      "question": "What is the primary goal of Iterative Deepening Depth First Search?",
      "options": ["A) To minimize the number of nodes explored", "B) To find the shortest path", "C) To find the goal node", "D) To maximize the depth"],
      "correct": 2,
      "explanation": "Iterative Deepening Depth First Search is an extension of Depth First Search that combines it with Iterative Deepening. It aims to find the goal node by gradually increasing the depth limit
